---
title: "Numerical Modelling of a Three-Story Building Using a Hybrid of Mass Timber Walls with Buckling-Restrained Braces"
date: 2022-05-27
categories: [conference, mass-timber]
venue: "10th International Conference on Behaviour of Steel Structures in Seismic Areas, Timisoara, Romania"
description: "Numerical modelling of a three-story building using mass timber walls with buckling-restrained braces."
---

## Event

**10th International Conference on Behaviour of Steel Structures in Seismic Areas (STESSA)**  
Timisoara, Romania · May 27, 2022

## Related links

- [Research](/research.qmd)
